title: Data Type
text: Data Type Use this field to select the basic data type of the Modeled Field Interface or the Database Interface property of a field. This field is not a property. It is only used to help with selecting a packing code. When selected, it populates the Data Packing property with the default packing code, if applicable. Applies to Field Modeled Field Interface Related Links Data Packing Data packing code for the field. Database Interface (Fields) This property (also known as the field interface) determines how data in the field is physically stored in the database. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
